title: S.O.2409(E) — in exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974) amendments in the notification.

F-15014/21/2009-Fdre=y | TS 34, g |iEa Feorur : @ wiguor fimor Q1S @1 o oY aTel qel STER[ET WRd @ Aed, § wiveries a1 .08 () i 21.09.1974 ERT FHIIG @ T | REmE S weue frizor @ &1 gafet FRY e ofiRpET WRd @ IedH, SIERY § werd PT.A1621(3), aE 27 Riday 2006 TG F1M859(3) TN 01 A 2007, P1.aM651(31) aa o W, 2000 gNI FHIRE @ TE I wvETdad e ¥ BLA1.2942(3) TG 18 TdaR, 2009 ERT fFY 7T | MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th October, 2010 S$.0.2409(E).—in exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0. 1621(E), dated the 27" September, 2006, namely:- In the said notification, (i) for serial number 7 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- 7 Chairman, - Member”; Haryana Pollution Control Board, Haryana. (i) for serial number 8 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “8 Chairman, - Member”; Bihar Pollution Control Board, Bihar. -- 3 of 5 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY (iii) for serial number 9 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “9. Chairman, - Member”; Maharashtra State Pollution Control Board, Mumbai. (iv) for serial number 10 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “10. Mayor, - Member”; Allahabad Nagar Nigam, Allahabad. (v) for serial number 11 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- bl Chairman, - Member”; Tamil Nadu State Pollution Control Board, Chennai. (vi) for serial number 13 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “13. Ms. Seema Arora, -Member”; CH, 23, Institutional Area, Lodi Road, New Delhi. (vii) for serial number 15 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “15. Dr. (Ms.) Meenakashi Kakkar, -Member”; DGM, Environment Management Division, SAIL, Lodhi Road, New Delhi. (viii) for serial number 16 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “16. ShriJiban Mahapatra, -Member”; Chief Manager (Environment), NALCO, Bhubneshwar. [F. No. Q- 15014/21/2009-CPW] RAJNEESH DUBE. Jt. Secy -- 4 of 5 -- [ 1= 3(ii)] AR T A STHER 5 Note : The principal notification constituting the Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India vide number GSR 998, (E), dated 21.09.1974. the notifications reconstituting the existing Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.0.1621(E), dated the 27" September, 2006, vide number 5.0.859(E), dated the 1" June, 2007 vide number S.0. 651(E), dated the 9" March 2009 and subsequently amended vide number 5.0.2942(E), dated the 18" November, 2009. 286 G é’(g lo—2— Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-1 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 -- 5 of 5 --
